source: Synthetic placeholder values — replace with proprietary calibration at data/saam_calibration.json
description: Plausible-but-synthetic Gaussian likelihood parameters for the DFI Bayesian uplift. The DHI Index is expressed as a fraction (DHI/100), where DHI ranges -23..+50 → fraction -0.23..+0.50. Each class has its empirical mean, calculated sample SD, and the chi-squared upper-confidence-bound SD (used by default; the calculated SD is selectable as an alternative).

Success.comment: Aggregate HC success (any oil/gas) — default class when no specific fluid type chosen

H2O_failure.comment: Wells that tested water in an evaluable reservoir

LSG_failure.comment: Low-Saturation Gas / NFO / other-fluid failures in evaluable reservoir (shared with Other-fluids class)

Reservoir_failure.comment: Reservoir failed / non-evaluable (used for both eval and non-eval reservoir failure modes)
